title: myrcia cuneata
intro: Myrcia cuneata, also known as the "Cuban bay" or "Beben," is a plant species belonging to the family Myrtaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Its health benefits include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues, among others. In herbal preparations, Myrcia cuneata is often used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
